Bug / Task Description: Cache.Put in internal/lru/lru.go inserts a new node at the front and should evict the least-recently-used entry only once the cache grows beyond its configured capacity. The eviction trigger currently fires one step too eagerly, so a freshly inserted key can immediately evict a still-valid entry and the cache never actually holds `capacity` distinct items; recently inserted keys can be reported absent right after being stored.
Commit Subject: fix(lru): evict only when capacity exceeded
